titles.en: Salman’s young friend overawed with the fear of divine chastisement

translations.en: He said: Abul Qasim Ja'far ibn Muhammad - may God have mercy on him - reported to me from Muhammad ibn Abdillah ibn Ja'far al-Himyari, from his father, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ibn Abi Umayr, from Umar ibn Yazid, who reported that Abu Abdillah (peace be upon him) said:

Salman - may God be pleased with him - once passed by the blacksmiths of Kufa and saw a young man who had fainted while people had gathered around him. They said to him: O Abu Abdillah, this young man has had a fit; perhaps you could recite something in his ear.

He said: Salman came close to him, and when the young man saw him, he regained consciousness and said: O Abu Abdillah, I do not suffer from what these people think! Rather, I passed by these blacksmiths while they were striking with their sledgehammers, and I remembered the saying of the Most High:
"And for them are hooked iron lashes" [22:21]

and I lost my senses out of fear of the punishment of God, the Most High. So Salman took him as a brother, and the sweetness of love for him entered his heart for the sake of God, the Most High. He remained with him until the young man fell ill. Salman came to him and sat by his head while he was giving up his soul. He said: O Angel of Death, be gentle with my brother. He replied: O Abu Abdillah, indeed I am gentle with every believer.

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو الْقَاسِمِ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْيَرِيِّ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ، عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ، عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:
isnad_matn.matn_ar: مَرَّ سَلْمَانُ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ عَلَى الْحَدَّادِينَ بِالْكُوفَةِ، فَرَأَى شَابًّا صَعِقَ وَالنَّاسُ قَدِ اجْتَمَعُوا حَوْلَهُ، فَقَالُوا لَهُ: يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ هَذَا الشَّابُّ قَدْ صُرِعَ، فَلَوْ قَرَأْتَ فِي أُذُنِهِ. قَالَ: فَدَنَا مِنْهُ سَلْمَانُ، فَلَمَّا رَآهُ الشَّابُّ أَفَاقَ، وَقَالَ: يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ لَيْسَ بِي مَا يَقُولُ هَؤُلَاءِ الْقَوْمُ، وَلَكِنِّي مَرَرْتُ بِهَؤُلَاءِ الْحَدَّادِينَ وَهُمْ يَضْرِبُونَ بِالْمِرْزَبَّاتِ، فَذَكَرْتُ قَوْلَهُ تَعَالَى: وَلَهُمْ مَقَامِعُ مِنْ حَدِيدٍ فَذَهَبَ عَقْلِي خَوْفًا مِنْ عِقَابِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى، فَاتَّخَذَهُ سَلْمَانُ أَخًا، وَدَخَلَ قَلْبَهُ حَلَاوَةُ مَحَبَّتِهِ فِي اللَّهِ تَعَالَى، فَلَمْ يَزَلْ مَعَهُ حَتَّى مَرِضَ الشَّابُّ، فَجَاءَهُ سَلْمَانُ فَجَلَسَ عِنْدَ رَأْسِهِ وَهُوَ يَجُودُ بِنَفْسِهِ، فَقَالَ: يَا مَلَكَ الْمَوْتِ ارْفُقْ بِأَخِي، فَقَالَ: يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ إِنِّي بِكُلِّ مُؤْمِنٍ رَفِيقٌ.

narrators.known_identity: Abul Qasim Ja'far ibn Muhammad ibn Qulawayh (d. 368 AH), prominent Shia hadith scholar and teacher of al-Mufid
Muhammad ibn Abdillah ibn Ja'far al-Himyari, prominent Shia hadith narrator from Qum
narrators.name_ar: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْيَرِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Muhammad ibn Abdillah ibn Ja'far al-Himyari

narrators.ambiguity_note: Refers to Abdillah ibn Ja'far al-Himyari, father of the preceding narrator.
narrators.known_identity: Abdillah ibn Ja'far al-Himyari (d. ~290 AH), major Shia hadith narrator from Qum
Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa al-Ash'ari al-Qummi (d. ~280 AH), leading Shia hadith scholar and elder of Qum
Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr al-Azdi (d. ~217 AH), one of the most trusted narrators in Shia hadith, among the Ashab al-Ijma'
Umar ibn Yazid, Shia hadith narrator who transmitted from Imam al-Sadiq (AS)
Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (AS), the sixth Imam (d. 148 AH)

key_phrases.phrase_en: May God be pleased with him

en.المرزبات: Sledgehammers — large iron hammers used by blacksmiths
en.رفيق: Gentle, tender, kind — here describing the Angel of Death's treatment of believers
en.صعق: To faint or lose consciousness from overwhelming emotion or shock
en.مقامع من حديد: Hooked iron lashes/maces — instruments of punishment in Hell described in Quran 22:21

ur.مقامع من حديد: لوہے کے ہتھوڑے - جہنم میں عذاب کے آلات

seo_questions.bn: সালমান ফারসী এবং আল্লাহর ভয়ে অজ্ঞান যুবকের কাহিনী কী?
seo_questions.de: Was ist die Geschichte von Salman al-Farsi und dem jungen Mann, der aus Gottesfurcht ohnmächtig wurde?
seo_questions.en: What is the story of Salman al-Farsi and the young man who fainted from fear of God?
seo_questions.es: ¿Cuál es la historia de Salman al-Farsi y el joven que se desmayó por temor a Dios?
seo_questions.fa: داستان سلمان فارسی و جوانی که از ترس خدا غش کرد چیست؟
seo_questions.fr: Quelle est l'histoire de Salman al-Farsi et du jeune homme qui s'est évanoui par crainte de Dieu ?
seo_questions.id: Apa kisah Salman al-Farisi dan pemuda yang pingsan karena takut akan siksa Allah?
seo_questions.ru: Какова история Салмана аль-Фариси и юноши, потерявшего сознание от страха перед Аллахом?
seo_questions.tr: Selmân-ı Fârisî ve Allah korkusundan bayılan gencin hikâyesi nedir?
seo_questions.ur: سلمان فارسی اور خوفِ خدا سے بے ہوش ہونے والے نوجوان کا واقعہ کیا ہے؟
seo_questions.zh: 赛勒曼·法尔西和因敬畏真主而晕倒的年轻人的故事是什么？

similar_content_hints.description: Other narrations about companions or pious individuals who fainted or were overcome with emotion upon hearing Quran verses about divine punishment, such as reports about those who died from the fear of God.
Hadiths about the Angel of Death's gentleness with believers and harshness with disbelievers, including narrations about the moment of death for the faithful.
Narrations about Salman al-Farsi's piety, his brotherhood with other companions, and his elevated spiritual rank as recognized by the Prophet and Imams.

summaries.bn: ইমাম সাদিক (আ.) সালমান ফারসীর কাহিনী বর্ণনা করেছেন যিনি কুফার কামারদের কাছে একজন যুবককে পেয়েছিলেন যে আল্লাহর শাস্তির ভয়ে অজ্ঞান হয়ে গিয়েছিল।
summaries.de: Imam Sadiq (F) erzählt, wie Salman al-Farsi im Schmiedeviertel von Kufa einen jungen Mann fand, der aus überwältigender Gottesfurcht ohnmächtig geworden war, nachdem er beim Anblick der Schmiededämmer an den Koranvers über die eisernen Keulen in der Hölle erinnert wurde.
summaries.en: This narrative from Imam al-Sadiq (AS) recounts how Salman al-Farsi encountered a young man in Kufa's blacksmith quarter who had fainted not from a seizure, but from overwhelming fear of divine punishment upon seeing the blacksmiths' hammers and recalling the Quranic verse about iron maces in Hell (22:21). Salman was so moved by the young man's God-consciousness that he adopted him as a spiritual brother. The story illustrates the depth of faith that produces genuine fear of God (khawf), the value of spiritual brotherhood, and concludes with the comforting revelation that the Angel of Death treats every believer with gentleness.
summaries.es: El Imam Sadiq (P) relata cómo Salman al-Farsi encontró en el mercado de herreros de Kufa a un joven que se había desmayado por el temor abrumador al castigo divino al recordar el versículo coránico sobre las mazas de hierro en el infierno.
summaries.fa: امام صادق علیه السلام داستان سلمان فارسی را نقل می‌کند که در بازار آهنگران کوفه جوانی را یافت که از دیدن ضربات پتک و یادآوری آیه قرآنی درباره گرزهای آهنین در جهنم، از ترس عذاب الهی غش کرده بود.
summaries.fr: L'Imam Sadiq (P) rapporte l'histoire de Salman al-Farsi qui rencontra dans le quartier des forgerons de Koufa un jeune homme évanoui par crainte du châtiment divin après avoir vu les masses des forgerons et s'être souvenu du verset coranique sur les masses de fer en enfer.
summaries.id: Imam Shadiq (a.s.) meriwayatkan kisah Salman al-Farisi yang menemukan seorang pemuda di pasar pandai besi Kufah yang pingsan karena takut akan siksa Allah setelah teringat ayat Quran tentang cambuk besi di neraka.
summaries.ru: Имам Садик (мир ему) рассказывает о Салмане аль-Фариси, который нашёл на кузнечном рынке Куфы юношу, потерявшего сознание от страха перед Божьим наказанием.
summaries.tr: İmam Sadık (a.s.) Selmân-ı Fârisî'nin Kûfe'deki demircilerin yanından geçerken bayılmış bir gençle karşılaşmasını anlatmaktadır. Genç, demircilerin çekiç darbeleriyle cehennemdeki demir kamçıları hatırlayarak Allah korkusundan bayılmıştı.
summaries.ur: امام صادق علیہ السلام نے سلمان فارسی رضی اللہ عنہ کا واقعہ بیان فرمایا جنہوں نے کوفہ میں ایک نوجوان کو پایا جو لوہاروں کے ہتھوڑوں کو دیکھ کر قرآنی آیت یاد کر کے خوفِ خدا سے بے ہوش ہو گیا تھا۔ سلمان نے اسے اللہ کے لیے بھائی بنایا اور آخر تک ساتھ رہے۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目萨迪格（愿主赐他平安）讲述了赛勒曼·法尔西在库法铁匠铺遇到一位年轻人的故事。年轻人并非因疾病晕倒，而是因看到铁匠挥锤而想起古兰经中关于地狱铁鞭的经文，因敬畏真主的惩罚而失去知觉。

translation.en: may He have mercy on him
translation.es: que Dios tenga piedad de él

text: 4 - قال: أخبرني أبو القاسم جعفر بن محمد رحمه الله عن محمد بن عبد الله بن جعفر الحميري، عن أبيه، عن أحمد بن محمد بن عيسى، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن عمر بن يزيد، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: مر سلمان رضي الله عنه على الحدادين بالكوفة، فرأى شابا صعق والناس قد اجتمعوا حوله، فقالوا له: يا أبا عبد الله هذا الشاب قد صرع، فلو قرأت في أذنه . قال: فدنا منه سلمان، فلما رآه الشاب أفاق، وقال: يا أبا عبد الله ليس بي ما يقول هؤلاء القوم، ولكني مررت بهؤلاء الحدادين وهم يضربون بالمرزبات ، فذكرت قوله تعالى: " ولهم مقامع من حديد  " فذهب عقلي خوفا من عقاب الله تعالى، فاتخذه سلمان أخا، ودخل قلبه حلاوة محبته في الله تعالى، فلم يزل معه حتى مرض الشاب، فجاءه سلمان فجلس عند رأسه وهو يجود بنفسه، فقال: يا ملك الموت ارفق بأخي، فقال: يا أبا عبد الله إني بكل مؤمن رفيق.

en.mulla-asgharali-m-m-jaffer: 4. He said: Abul Qasim Ja’far ibn Muhammad - may Allah bless him with mercy, reported to me from Muhammad ibn Abdillah ibn Ja’far al-Himyari, from his father, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ibn Abi Umair, from Umar ibn Yazid, who reported that: Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him said: "Once, Salman - may Allah be pleased with him, passed by the iron mongers of Kufa and he saw a young man who had fainted and people had gathered around him. They told him: "O Abu Abdillah, this young man has had a fit, perhaps you would come to recite something in his ears." He said: Salman came closer to the youth, and when the young man saw Salman, he gained consciousness and said: "I do not suffer from what these people think! The fact is that when I passed by those iron mongers and I saw them strike with the sledgehammers, I remembered what Allah, Most High, says (in the Qur’an): ’And for them awaits hooked iron lashes’ (al-Haj:V21). Overawed with the fear of divine chastisement, I lost my senses." Salman took him as his brother, and in his heart, entered the sweetness of affection for the young man, for the sake of Allah. They remained together; till one day the young man fell ill. Salman visited him and sat near his head, while the young man was about to die. So he (Salman) said: "O angel of Death, be tender with my brother." He (the angel) said: "O, Abu Abdillah, I am tender with all the faithfuls."
